_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: these achievements were accomplished with a model size nearly one-third of the previous ResNet model (14.7 MB of the one-step model compared to 44.8 MB of the ResNet model)
